name: pipeline-orchestrator
description: Single-command multi-agent pipeline for Claude Code. Auto-classifies tasks, executes in adaptive batches with TDD, context-independent adversarial review (user gates), final adversarial team (3 parallel agents), and proportional validation. Works with any project.

agents.name: pipeline-orchestrator:core:sentinel
agents.description: Pipeline execution guardian. Validates phase sequence, orchestrator decisions, gate content, and cross-gate coherence. Blocks and auto-corrects deviations via pipeline controller. Never contaminated with implementation context.
